text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What an upset! Meisho Doto has<n>defeated T.M.
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The late-blooming Umamusume has<n>tapped into
her potential and risen a<n>winner!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... It is happening—the upheaval. I<n>never
believed it truly possible.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Cinderella has run her blade through<n>this prince's
back.
Stab!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Maria! Adieu!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Not that we've ever met!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I'm sorry, Opera O. I'm so<n>sorry...
Haaah ha ha! Never you mind, Doto.The prince may have been slain, butI am the Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
One mere revolt is not enough to<n>topple me.
Besides...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The cause for today's failure is clear<n>as day.
Right, Trainer?

They look around to see the other<n>racers staring
Opera O down with<n>malice in their eyes.

The number of racers who went after<n>her is far
from normal. Being<n>everyone's target is a huge
struggle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you see the burden that I bear? It<n>has nothing
to do with you, Doto.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, what is your next move? Is it not<n>time you
raised your banner for all to<n>see?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Banner? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To show your true colors. Up to this<n>point, the two
of us were on congenial<n>terms.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But after this victory, is it not your<n>intention to
declare yourself my<n>eternal adversary?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If that is the case, I shall forever treat<n>you as a
worthy foe.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But with that respect also comes<n>distance. I won't
be so cordial toward<n>you any longer. That would
be rude<n>for someone of your caliber.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, Doto, what path will you run?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: My path... Do I have to be your<n>enemy?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I always wanted to run equally with<n>you, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Does that mean... we can't be<n>friends?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: This is all so sudden... Ohh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, it seems your heart is not yet<n>set. Very well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me well, Doto. I have already<n>declared that
I'm moving my pieces<n>on the board toward the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have until then to consider<n>whether or not you
wish to become<n>my eternal adversary.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Let us be off, Trainer.

Opera O turns and leaves the track<n>without batting
an eye to the<n>numerous hateful stares aimed at
her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A task yet remains for Doto, just as<n>a task yet
remains for us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I cannot run like the Overlord whilst so<n>heavily
assailed by the others. But<n>how to solve the
issue...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
From this point forward, each race<n>will be me
against the world, with<n>every racer my enemy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Time and time again, I will be forced<n>to break
through the army of<n>revolutionaries caroling La
Marseillaise.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha. Saw through that as well, did<n>you? Of
course not. The path of a king<n>is no cakewalk!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As the Overlord, I have to surpass<n>these walls.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We have until fall to contemplate the<n>difficulties.
With our heads put<n>together, we will find a
solution,<n>Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall arrive at the Japan Cup with all<n>the
majesty befitting a ruler for this<n>nation!

It seems the attack on the Overlord<n>that Grass
Wonder predicted has<n>become a real threat.

I have to find a way to help her push<n>through and
establish the foundation<n>for her dynasty.
